summary: Added geometry attribute sanity checks: created validateGeometryAttributes() utility that checks BufferGeometry attributes for existence, correct itemSize, and finite values. Wired validation into all three geometry systems (pointCloud, particleField, ribbonField) after setAttribute calls — each with its own REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES constant (particleField omits color). Modified renderLoop to wrap geometry init in try/catch with a geometryValid flag that gates draw() calls, keeping the placeholder mesh as fallback on failure. Added AttributeSpec type to types.ts. All 35 new tests pass (13 validator unit tests, 15 system integration tests, 6 render loop gate tests, 1 type test). Build passes, 761 total tests pass.
